---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for MediaConverter
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Description

A clear description of the feature.

---

# Motivation

Why is this feature needed?

Example:

Batch processing would allow generating datasets from multiple videos automatically.

---

# Proposed Solution

Describe how you think the feature should work.

Example:

- Input: folder of videos
- Output: frames organized by video name
- Option: configurable FPS

---

# Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you considered.

---

# Additional Context

Provide diagrams, examples, or references if needed.
